questions.question: Explain DHCP lease renewal process
keyPoints: T1 timer (50% lease time): Attempts renewal with original server
T2 timer (87.5% lease time): Broadcasts renewal to any server
If expired, releases IP and restarts discovery

questions.question: Compare BOOTP and DHCP in detail
keyPoints: BOOTP: Static IP assignments vs DHCP dynamic allocation
DHCP added lease management and additional options
Both use UDP 67/68 but DHCP supports relay agents better
